jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Milkbasket
jsonLd.description:
Milkbasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Milkbasket:
Milkbasket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket!
